utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: So it is down to these two , Nancy I know you like this one and I think I agree . Rachel , what do you think ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well umm , that one is pretty but uh , I just , I just love this fabric Sorry .

utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: Oh do not be sorry , that is part of your job here to give your opinions and then I take credit for them ... I am kidding .

utterances.speaker: Nancy
utterances.text: She is kidding , but do not ever disagree with her again . Okay , now I am kidding !

utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: I do not know which one , but I do know I need a cigarette .

utterances.speaker: Kim
utterances.text: So what do you say we take a break , we go outside , and we will figure this out when we come back ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh no , my dad a doctor and he would always tell me just horror stories ... about ghosts and goblins who totally supported the princess right to smoke .

emotion_cause.span: 9_he would always tell me just horror stories
